query: JSON schema null field when status clean suggested_fix_surface validator prompt

results.title: Allow null value for non-required fields (json schema) [#2958251] | Drupal.org
results.description: After looking at this patch some more and thinking through what you are doing, my expectation is that rather than fix the error, you've probably made the schema definition for optional properties unenforceable. If you test the resulting schema for validity, it may even be broken.

results.title: Tips for JSON Schema Validation - Database Manual - MongoDB Docs
results.description: If your schema validates data types for a field, to insert documents with a null value for that field, you must explicitly allow null as a valid BSON type.

results.title: Forums | Microsoft Power Platform Community
results.description: Quickly search for answers, join discussions, post questions, and work smarter in your business applications by joining the Microsoft Dynamics 365 Community.

results.title: Validation error when field is nullable and consumer sends in a null value · Issue #183 · networknt/json-schema-validator
results.description: The validator identifies it correctly as nullable, however proceeds to look for null as a value in the enumerated fields. It is a delta between OpenAPI and JSONSchema specifications: -- https://json-schema.org/understanding-json-schema/refe...

results.title: How to allow None (null) for fields in JSON Schema?
results.description: How to allow None (null) for fields in JSON Schema · Hey Hooman. This is because you require fb_id be a string, and null is not a string. If you also want to allow null values for fb_id, you can set its schema to {"type": ["string", "null"]} · Hi Chase, Thank you very much, it worked.
